case_id: AR workflow implementation for Customer ID 5

pi_items.source: Local path referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh - cannot verify without running task
Local path referenced in export_result.sh - cannot verify without running task
Local path referenced in export_result.sh - cannot verify without running task
Direct SQLite query on environment database (benchmarks/cua_world/environments/dbeaver_env/data/chinook.db): SELECT CustomerId FROM customers WHERE CustomerId = 5 returns 5
Environment database analysis: 332 invoices have InvoiceDate < '2013-01-01', 80 invoices have InvoiceDate >= '2013-01-01' (total 412)
Environment database analysis: MAX(InvoiceDate) = 2013-12-22, which is before the report date of 2013-12-31

Direct SQLite query on environment database: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM customers WHERE CustomerId = 5 returns František|Wichterlová. Verified against public Chinook database on GitHub - same customer name.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook database with invoice dates ranging from 2009-01-01 to 2013-12-22. Customer ID 5 exists in the database. The cutoff date of 2013-01-01 divides invoices into pre-2013 (332 invoices) and post-2013 (80 invoices) groups. The report date of 2013-12-31 is positioned after all actual invoice dates in the database. However, the task description contains a factual error: Customer ID 5 is identified as 'Jakub Berthelsen' in the task description, but the actual customer name in the database is 'František Wichterlová'.
